short_description: Freshness, volume, and schema-change monitoring for Databricks tables — no external service to deploy.
long_description: Part of the Dashlibs suite for Databricks. Provides an ipywidgets notebook UI plus a Python API for monitoring table freshness, row-count volume (including rolling baseline deviation), and schema changes, with results persisted to a Delta history table. Install with %pip install dash-observe and call dashobserve.launch() to open the interactive wizard.
